body.query:
query ($v1: pour_card_bool_exp) {
    pour_card(where: $v1, limit: 1) {
      id
      pour_card_no
      pour_card_type
      project_name
      project_code
      jmr_number
      log_number
      member_id
      department_number
      specific_location
      remarks
      chargeable_to
      attachment_url
      structure_type
      approval_status
      created_at
      created_by_user_id
      pour_details(order_by: { created_at: desc }, limit: 1) {
        id
        level
        pouring_date
        concrete_grade
        concrete_quantity
        mix_design_reference
        slump_test_performed
        samples_prepared
        temperature_value
        weather_condition
        duration_hours
        weather_staging_checked
        concrete_temperature_registered
        cooling_arrangement_checked
        inspected_structure_type
        drg_reference
        tech_specification
        inspection_accepted
        non_conformance_flag
        non_conformance_doc_number
        non_conformance_url
      }
      structure_details {
        id
        structure_name
        large_foundation_flag
      }
      pour_card_approval_system {
        id
        department_id
        status
        remarks
        approved_at
        user_id
        team_member_id
      }
      pour_card_checklist {
        id
        checklist_item_id
        status
        remarks
        checked_at
        checked_by_invite_id
        checklist_items_master {
          id
          item_name
          display_order
          section_id
          checklist_section {
            id
            name
            display_order
            category_id
            checklist_category {
              id
              name
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
    checklist_categories(order_by: { name: asc }) {
      id
      name
      checklist_sections(order_by: { display_order: asc }) {
        id
        name
        display_order
        checklist_items_masters(
          where: { is_active: { _eq: true } }
          order_by: { display_order: asc }
        ) {
          id
          item_name
          display_order
        }
      }
    }
  }
